description_long: This sculpture depicts two nude male figures standing side by side, with one figure's arm draped over the other's shoulder in a gesture of camaraderie or support. Both figures are rendered in a classical style, with detailed musculature and naturalistic poses. The figure on the left appears to be slightly bent forward, while the figure on the right stands more upright and holds a staff or rod. At their feet, there is a small, square pedestal or object, and behind them stands a smaller, fully clothed female figure, possibly representing a deity or symbolic character. The entire group is mounted on a rectangular base, and the surface is a uniform, pale stone color with some subtle weathering or patina. The composition suggests a narrative or mythological scene, typical of neoclassical or ancient Greek-inspired public art.
description: A classical-style sculpture of two nude male figures in a supportive pose, accompanied by a smaller clothed female figure on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing both male figures in full detail, with the left figure leaning and the right figure holding a staff; the smaller female figure stands behind them.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the right male figure and the full side of the smaller female figure behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of both male figures and the back of the smaller female figure, with the base and pedestal visible.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the profile of the left male figure and a partial view of the smaller female figure behind.
attribute_subject_matter: two nude male figures with a smaller clothed female figure, in a classical or mythological scene
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture appears isolated against a plain background.
